explanation: This is the original true positive command and is not modified.
The /interactive flag is replaced with its short form /i, which is functionally equivalent.
Extra space is inserted before the /interactive flag, which is a valid mutation technique.
No space is inserted between the time and the /interactive flag, which may still be parsed correctly depending on the system.
The flag is capitalized, which is a valid mutation technique as Windows is case-insensitive.
